data.title: Add eval test case for brainstorm enrich-in-place behavior
data.description:
Add test case to plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml:

1. Test case: given an enrich-in-place selection for a non-epic ticket, verify the skill runs a streamlined dialogue and updates the ticket with structured content (acceptance criteria, approach summary, file paths) — NOT entering the full epic brainstorm flow

TDD: test-exempt: static config — eval configuration YAML contains no conditional logic and no executable behavior; the promptfoo eval runner exercises the behavioral test at eval time. Criterion: static assets only (unit exemption criterion 3).

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] promptfooconfig.yaml contains an enrich-in-place test case
  Verify: grep -q 'enrich.*in.*place\|enrich.*place\|streamlined.*dialogue' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Eval config is valid YAML
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml'))"
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
